form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 11 at Riverton on April 4 over 1400m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Tomasina with 55kg at $9.40. Before that settled back and ran on when 9th of 15 at Riccarton Park in the G3 South Island Thoroughbred Breeders? Stakes on March 21 over 1600m, 5.5 len behind Inflamed with 55kg at $27.70. Can improve on the latest effort and is expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation second of 13 at Phar Lap Racecourse November 19 over 2200m, 1.75 len behind California Gold carrying 54.5kg at $6.60. When resuming last campaign second of 10 at this track February 23 2025 over 1400m, on rain affected going; a nose behind Bracero with 56.5kg at $5.60. Likely to make her presence felt.
